ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the simulation was run */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robot used in the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the environment (e.g., simple, medium, complex) */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario being simulated (e.g., navigation, object manipulation) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features or characteristics of the environment (e.g., obstacles, terrain type) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robot */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of robot (e.g., mobile, stationary, humanoid) */,
  "capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities of the robot (e.g., manipulation, navigation) */,
  "sensors" TEXT /* Sensors equipped on the robot (e.g., camera, lidar, gps) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the robot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the robot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the robot was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface, command line) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the environment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_versions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
